arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola is showing signs of tiredness – I know his perfect Man City replacement
arts.sum: Former Arsenal midfielder Emmanuel Petit believes Manchester City should replace Pep Guardiola with his former assistant and Gunners manager Mikel Arteta

arts.ttl: Martin Odegaard still 'a long way' from Arsenal return as absence compared to Man City star
arts.sum: Arsenal captain Martin Odegaard has been sidelined since suffering a significant ankle injury while playing in the Nations League for Norway in September's international break

arts.ttl: Ex-Manchester City man Mario Balotelli could join 12th club as offer from third tier 'considered'
arts.sum: Mario Balotelli has been without a club since leaving Turkish side Adana Demirspor in the summer and the former Manchester City striker could be set to join his 12th different team

arts.ttl: Premier League market value update: Erling Haaland becomes world MVP, Cole Palmer hits €90m
arts.sum: This Tuesday October 1, the most valuable football league in the world, the Premier League, received 115 new market values, increasing its total value by +€167 million to a new total of...

arts.ttl: Why is Rodri not playing for Manchester City today against Slovan Bratislava in the Champions League?
arts.sum: I think it will be until the next international break,” Guardiola said of the injury to Ake. Manchester City were eliminated at the quarter-final stage of the 2023/24 Champions League but they will be among the favourites to reclaim the European crown this time around.

arts.ttl: ‘Wow’: Pep Guardiola in disbelief as he learns bizarre link between Man City and Champions League opponents
arts.sum: Manchester City face Slovan Bratislava in the Champions League and Pep Guardiola was in disbelief after learning a bizarre fact.

arts.ttl: ‘Pep Guardiola looks to be lacking energy – I know who his Man City replacement should be'
arts.sum: Eight years after he touched down in Manchester, Pep Guardiola's energy has been described as 'lacking' by an Arsenal legend, who believes he knows the perfect replacement for City

arts.ttl: Mario Balotelli 'receives offer from third-tier Spanish side' but the former Man City striker may need to wait until January before playing for what would be the 12th club of his career
arts.sum: The 34-year-old Italian forward has been a free agent since leaving Adana Demirspor in Turkey this summer. Balotelli scored seven goals in 16 games in the Turkish Super Lig last season.

arts.ttl: Man City line-up vs Slovan Bratislava predicted as Phil Foden plan clear and Kyle Walker call made
arts.sum: Manchester City return to Champions League action on Tuesday night when they visit Slovan Bratislava

arts.ttl: Champions League predictions: Tuesday's matchday 2 fixtures
arts.sum: Inter, who made a huge statement on matchday one by stifling Man City at the Etihad Stadium, will expect to kick on and consolidate with Red Star Belgrade at home. Looking to get off the mark for the season, Manchester City travel to Slovakia to face Slovan Bratislava, while another heavyweight in Barcelona are home to Young Boys of Bern.
